trail.val: line of sight >$100B AI chips FY27 (Q1 FY26 call)
FY27 AI reiterated ">$100B" ("easily exceed"), no raise — drove -12.6% reaction
AVGO told UBS FY27 AI could be raised to $110-120B but won't ratchet every quarter; investors already ~$150B FY27
JPM models AVGO $150B+ AI revenue in 2027 (>2x ~$60B 2026E); views >$100B backlog as conservative

forward.note: Binary debate: disclosed >$100B vs buyside $150B+; omission of a raise, not demand, was the issue.

trail.val: ~10GW shipments in FY27, back-half loaded; "a lot more gigawatts" in FY28; 20GW XPU platform through 2028
FY28 steps up materially more than FY27-over-FY26; 20GW SPV implies ~15GW Anthropic+OpenAI parked into FY28
JPM: ~20-22GW deploy in FY28 → $250-300B AI rev, ~$35-38 EPS vs cons ~$25

forward.note: FY28 is the real story; multi-GW ramp gated by power/datacenter readiness, not HBM.

trail.val: ~3M TPU units 2025 (supply-chain check), buy-side crept to ~4M
TPU order book ~6.5M units for next year (up from prior ~5.5-6M); >$150B backlog next year
Total AVGO TPU ~6.2M units in 2027 (mix V8i/V9i); 2027 CoWoS share cut to 24-25%

forward.note: V8i Sunfish the FY27 driver; OpenAI/Meta projects slip to 2H27, limiting V9i.

trail.val: FY26 accelerates; >$100B AI chips FY27 line of sight

forward.note: FY26 raised/reiterated; Q3 FY26 guide AI $16.0B was the clear miss vs buyside ~$18.5B.

trail.val: Q3 FY26 GM down ~310bps q/q to ~74% on ASIC mix
GM held to ~74% over next 3-4 quarters (down on AI-semi/XPU mix, not HBM, not racks)

forward.note: Structural GM dilution as low-margin ASICs scale; ~$2.5k HBM pass-through per ~$12k TPU an added drag.

trail.val: V9 NOT cancelled, pushed out: V8i MP late 3Q26, V9 MP late 3Q27 → V9i very limited 2027
Broadcom Google share 6%(2026)→30%(2028) [MediaTek gain]; 400G V9-vs-V10 the key swing; MediaTek doesn't charge HBM in BOM

forward.note: HBM-in-BOM is the structural reason Google shifts TPU share to MediaTek; 400G timing the cap on MediaTek's gains.
